subject: Possible GRB 030110 seen by SPI ACS
body:
The ISDC Shift Team and the INTEGRAL SPI-ACS GRB team reports:

A possible GRB has been seen in the INTEGRAL SPI-ACS light curve on
03-01-10 at  10:13:10 UT.  The duration of the GRB is very short at
approx. 150ms.  No position information is available.  The lightcurve is

available at
ftp://isdcarc.unige.ch/arc/FTP/ibas/spiacs/2003-01-10T10-13-10.0000-00000-00000.lc
